zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Killigrew於1528年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle41歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard10歲。他於1565年11月4日與Katherine Cooke在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 彼得 勒 波爾 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 芬克結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1603年3月2日在英國英格蘭倫敦洛斯賀波利享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦洛斯賀波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Killigrew于1528年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle41岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard10岁。他于1565年11月4日与Katherine Cooke在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 彼得 勒 波爾 煙雨 聖 貝尼特 芬克结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1603年3月2日在英国英格兰倫敦洛斯賀波利享年75岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦洛斯賀波利。

nameMeanings.name: Killigrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Cornish: locative name from Killigrew in Saint Erme (Cornwall).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Killigrew was born in 1528, in England, his father, Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle, was 41 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard, was 10. He married Katherine Cooke on 4 November 1565, in London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died on 2 March 1603, in Lothbury, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in Lothbury, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Killigrew est né en 1528, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Cooke le 4 novembre 1565, à London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé le 2 mars 1603, à Lothbury, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Lothbury, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Killigrew 1528 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle 41 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard 10. Er hat am 4. November 1565 in London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, England Katherine Cooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb am 2. März 1603 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Lothbury, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lothbury, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Killigrew è nato il nel 1528 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Cooke il 4 novembre 1565, nel London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì il 2 marzo 1603, nel Lothbury, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Lothbury, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Killigrewが1528年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castleは41歳，母Lady Elizabeth Trewinnardは10歳であった。1565年11月4日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト ペター ル ポエル ウィス スト ベンエット フィンクでKatherine Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1603年3月2日にイギリスイギリスロンドンロスブリーで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンロスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter Le Poer, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 피터 일 포어 위스 스트 베넷 핑크
ko.St Peter Le Poor, London, England: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 피터 일 포어 위스 스트 베넷 핑크
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Killigrew(이)가 1528년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1565년 11월 4일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 피터 일 포어 위스 스트 베넷 핑크에서 Katherine Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1603년 3월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 로스버이에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 로스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Killigrew nasceu em 1528, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Cooke em 4 de novembro de 1565, em London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de março de 1603, em Lothbury, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Lothbury, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Killigrew родился в 1528 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Cooke 4 ноября 1565 г. в местности лондон ст питир л поир вит ст бинет финк, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер 2 марта 1603 г. в местности лотбури, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности лотбури, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Killigrew nació en 1528, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Killigrew III First Gov. Pendennis Castle, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Trewinnard, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Katherine Cooke el 4 de noviembre de 1565, en London St Peter le Poer with St Benet Fink, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió el 2 de marzo de 1603, en Lothbury, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Lothbury, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
